Bus Timings

E700 Bus Schedule Dubai to Fujairah

October 23, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Don’t sleep on Fujairah when you’re in the UAE. It’s a stunning contrast to Dubai’s hustle - think rugged mountains and pristine beaches instead of skyscrapers. Getting there’s a breeze too. While you could grab a taxi or rent a car, the E700 bus is your best bet. It’s cheap, and you’ll get to soak in some killer views on the way. Trust me, Fujairah’s natural beauty will blow you away. Contents

Dubai to Fujairah Bus Timing

Whether you’re an early riser or prefer to travel later in the day, the E700 bus service caters to a variety of schedules. Departing from Union Square Station in Dubai as early as 5:30 AM and continuing until midnight, travelers have ample opportunities to embark on their journey at a time that suits them best.

With buses departing approximately every hour, missing a bus is rarely a concern, ensuring a hassle-free travel experience. And here is the timetable of Dubai Fujairah bus timing, you can read it or save it on your phone.

From Dubai From Fujairah
07:00 05:00
08:00 06:30
09:30 08:00
10:40 09:30
12:15 10:40
13:30 12:15
15:00 13:30
16:15 15:00
17:35 16:15
19:00 17:35
20:15 19:00
21:45 20:30
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

This simplified timetable provides the departure and arrival times for each trip from Dubai to Fujairah, helping travelers plan their journeys effectively. For the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link for E700 Bus Timings.## E700 Bus Route

Equipped with modern amenities such as air conditioning and ample seating, these buses ensure a pleasant journey from start to finish.

com/f34-bus-timetable/) Stops along the way includeDNATA, Dubai Airport Terminal 1 External Parking, Sharjah Cement Factory, Dhaid Post Office, Thoban ENOC Petrol Station, Masafi Friday Market, and Ajman University Fujairah, among others.

Each stop offers a glimpse into the unique culture and heritage of the region, making for an enriching journey beyond the destination itself. Other bus routes in Dubai that you can check out include the E307A bus route, which runs from Abu Hail Bus Station to Al Jubail Bus Station, and the 5 bus route, which travels from Abu Hail Bus Station to Al Ras, Public Library, and back.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 23, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
